evidence.quote: [Verbatim quote or data point — e.g., 'I spend every Monday morning for 3 hours copying data between Splunk and our ticketing system']
[Verbatim quote — e.g., 'Honestly our current process works fine, we just deal with it']
evidence.notes: Contradictory signal — suggests not everyone experiences the pain

schema.quote: Verbatim quote or specific data point
hypothesis_ids: H-NNN — which hypotheses this evidence relates to
schema.date: YYYY-MM-DD when the evidence was collected
schema.reference: Source link, interview reference, or document citation
schema.forge: Forge number when evidence was collected
schema.model_source: Which model generated this evidence tag (opus | sonnet | haiku | human). For audit trail.
